patches.name: Show deleted messages
patches.description: Preserves content of deleted messages and shows them in the chat list.

patches.name: SSL pinning bypass
patches.description: Bypasses SSL certificate pinning via manifest flags and disables Sentry.

patches.name: Show actual message count
patches.description: Shows the real unread/message count instead of capping the display at 99+.

patches.name: Show hidden messages
patches.description: Shows messages hidden by the server in the chat room.
